message:
feat(abi): add 33 GlibcCallThrough wrappers for syslog, regex, network, dir, misc POSIX

Adds passthrough wrappers across 6 ABI modules:
- dirent: seekdir, telldir, rewinddir, scandir
- syslog: openlog, syslog, closelog, vsyslog
- regex/pattern: regcomp, regexec, regfree, regerror, fnmatch, glob, globfree
- process: execvpe
- signal: sigwait, sigpending
- network DB: gethostbyname, gethostbyaddr, getservbyname, getservbyport,
  getprotobyname, getprotobynumber
- misc POSIX: confstr, pathconf, fpathconf, nice, daemon, getpagesize,
  gethostid, getdomainname, mkdtemp

Totals: 627 exported (383 Implemented, 172 RawSyscall, 72 GlibcCallThrough)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
